# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: myapp
  labels:
    app: myapp
spec:
  containers:
  - name: myapp
    image: myapp:1.0.0
    ports:
    - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v2
name: myapp-helm-chart
description: A simple Helm chart for Kubernetes

type: application

version: 0.1.0
appVersion: 1.0.0

dependencies:
  - name: myapp
    version: 1.0.0
    repository: "@localpath"

---
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: myapp-job
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: myapp-job
        image: myapp-job:1.0.0
      restartPolicy: Never
  backoffLimit: 4
